channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Drain in road completely blocked, 12th June
item.description:
In the road by the postbox

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colesbourne Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Dead Badger in Road, 12th June
item.description:
Large dead badger in road from Staverton Village to Boddington before turn off to Barrow
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Boddington Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping rubbish bye pumping station, 12th June
item.description:
Rubbish trolley s sofas black bags etc

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Persimmon Gardens, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At the junction of Buckholt Road and the B40470 new pothole around manhole cover, 12th June
item.description:
A previous repair around this manhole is lifting near the verge as you proceed from Birdlip. Traffic is again swerving to avoid the exposed metalwork which is at the point of a blind crest.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): B4070, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes and broken up road between carriageways turning right from Telstar Way onto A40, 11th June
item.description:
When the major A40 works took place ~2020, this area between the carriageway at the A40/Telstar Way junction was the only section of the whole road that was NOT resurfaced. It was in poor quality at the time, and has continued to deteriorate ever since. Turning R onto the A40 from the left hand lane drivers are forced to either take an awkward left-hand line, or drive directly over a growing pothole or a right-hand line that puts them dangerously close to traffic turning into the A40 from the right hand lane. I believe this should have been resurfaced with the rest of the road. Please can it be fixed before it gets worse, and inevitably causes damage to vehicles.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Telstar Way, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A double white mattress dumped for a week, 11th June
item.description:
It is opposite Prestbury Car Valeting Centre where a lot of flytipping occurs... It is near the River Chelt stream running behind it. I walk the dog regularly and I never see this happening so it must be done sneakily at night or early morning...a real eyesore and a pet hate of mine!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 126, Prestbury Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is a large white double fridge dumped outside, 11th June
item.description:
Outside Nazeby House Cromwell Road where the waste rubbish is stored. Been there a week...
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cromwell Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole outside 83 Warden Hill Road again., 11th June
item.description:
Outside 83 Warden Hill Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 81, Warden Hill Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen Wall, 11th June
item.description:
This wall opposite 132 swindon road is collapsed. It has been like thos for a year and a half now and desperately needs repairing. Who can I escalate this to?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swindon Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes in usual place as latest repair has failed, 11th June
item.description:
In road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Whittington Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large number of potholes at junction of chancel way/st Edward’s walk and school rear exit roadway and pavement, 11th June
item.description:
Large number of potholes and break down of tarmac surface affecting chancel way, st Edward’s walk and the rear exist of st Edward’s school. I witnessed a nasty bicycle accident on this area of tarmac this week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Chancel Way, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Low hanging broken tree branch overhanging the road, 11th June
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shurdington Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham

item.description:
There are three areas of wear across the junction

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Ermin Street, Brockworth, Tewkesbury

item.title: Signage left behind when a metal bollard was removed, 11th June
item.description:
Replace the metal bollard and remove the signage. This has already been reported to you by one of our neighbours in February and no action has been taken
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 185, Hewlett Road, Battledown, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 73, Ermin Street, Brockworth, Gloucester

item.title: Priority roadmarkings need installing at this loc'n as two vehicles cannot pass at this awkward pinchpoint elbow in carriageway, frequent roadrage incidents as a result over priority and several minor RTCs (only minor as to date no vehicles has yet veered into pedestrians/other legitimate footway users)., 11th June
item.description:
As marked on map on surprisingly sharp narrow pinchpoint bend. And so close to a jtcn too!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Shelley Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs
